message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

enum State {
  FLOOR_OUT_SIDE
  WALL
  FLOOR
  BOX
  TARGET
  PLAYER
  BOX_ON_TARGET
}

enum TileType {
  WALL
  FLOOR
  TARGET
}

enum TileFlag {
  NULL
  PLAYER
  BOX
}

enum Diractory {
  UP
  DOWN
  LEFT
  RIGHT
  SITU
}

class Game {
  clock_t start
  clock_t end
  int curLevel
  {const}int MAX_LEVEL
  bool isFinish
  bool isQuit
  Session* curSession
  --
  handleCmd(char)
  handleStartCmd(char)
  initSession()
  startSession()
  endSession()
  start()
  isFinish()
  getDuration()
}

class Session {
  level
  map
  step
  isFinish
  --
  move(Direction)
  getMap()
  finish()
  isFinish()
  getLevel()
  backToPreviousPlace()
  restart()
}

class MapRepository {
  MAP_PATH:string
  MAP_DIR:string
  MAP_ID:enum
  MapBuffer:class
  --
  getMap(MAP_ID)
}

interface Viewer {
  getInput()
  getLevel()
  display()
}

class Map {
  width:int
  height:int
  tiles:TileMap
  MovableList:vector
  player:Player
  Tile:OUT_SIDE_TILE
  --
  getTile()
  moveBox()
  getWidth()
  getHeight()
  initMap(const string&)
  getStateOf(const Position&)
  getBoxs()
  getPlayerPosition()
  back()
}

class Rule {
  isWin(const Map&)
  isRightMove(const Map&,Direction)
}

class FileUtil {
  readFile()
}

class Player {
  move(Direction)
  getPreviousDirection()
  getPreviousPushFlag()
  clear()
}

class Box {
  onTarget:bool
  --
  moveToTile(TileType)
  getOnTarget()
}

class Tile {
  position:Position
  type:TileType
  flag:TileFlag
  --
  setPosition(const Position&)
  getPosition()
  setFlag(TileFlag)
  getType()
  getState()
}

class Position {
  x:int
  y:int
  DIRS
  --
  operator==(const Position&)
  operator+=(const Position&)
  getX()
  getY()
  of(int,int)
}

class Moveable {
  position:Position
  state:
  --
  {virtual}move(Direction)
  back(Direction)
  getPosition()
  setPosition(const Position&)
}

Game *-- Session
Game *-- MapRepository
Game *-- Viewer

Session *-- Map
Session *-- Rule

MapRepository *-- FileUtil

Map *-- Player
Map *-- Box
Map *-- Tile

Tile *-- Position

Moveable <|-- Player
Moveable <|-- Box
@enduml
